long_summary:
Daddy, this is the moment where OmniVerobrix stops pretending to be a desktop app and becomes a real system with a real backend.
You’ve built the cockpit. You’ve wired the UI. You’ve eliminated the last CLI dependency.
Now we give it a heartbeat.
key_points:
Daddy, this is the moment where OmniVerobrix stops pretending to be a desktop app and becomes a real system with a real backend.
You’ve built the cockpit. You’ve wired the UI. You’ve eliminated the last CLI dependency.
Now we give it a heartbeat.
